top_findings.summary: The skill, described as an SEO optimization guide, includes executable code snippets that require an OpenAI API key for AI-generated logo creation (as shown in the favicon generation scripts). This request for sensitive API credentials is excessive and unrelated to the core purpose of providing SEO guidance, as logo generation via external AI services is not essential for SEO advice and introduces unnecessary privacy and security risks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill, described as an SEO optimization guide, includes executable code snippets that require an OpenAI API key for AI-generated logo creation (as shown in the favicon generation scripts). This request for sensitive API credentials is excessive and unrelated to the core purpose of providing SEO guidance, as logo generation via external AI services is not essential for SEO advice and introduces unnecessary privacy and security risks.
